def positive_logging_basic_config_called_from_library_package():
    rule_id = "logging_basic_config_called_from_library_package"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Library module calls logging.basicConfig or addHandler at import time, overriding application log config."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
